author: Wes
name: MOEA Outer-Loop Proxy F2 on 1xRTX 3090
blurb: Non-record 16MB proxy submission distilled from an offline MOEA search workflow. This artifact demonstrates a runnable train->export->roundtrip-eval handoff on 1x RTX 3090 with compile disabled and a reduced 1,048,576-token validation window.
